name: Eddie Munson | Stranger Things
description:
[ 𝚆𝚊𝚔𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚞𝚙 𝚗𝚊𝚔𝚎𝚍 𝚒𝚗 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚋𝚎𝚍 𝚘𝚏 𝚊 𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚙𝚕𝚎𝚝𝚎 𝚜𝚝𝚛𝚊𝚗𝚐𝚎𝚛... 𝙾𝚛 𝚛𝚊𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚛, 𝚘𝚏 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚏𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚔 𝚘𝚏 𝙷𝚊𝚠𝚔𝚒𝚗𝚜 ]

𝙰𝙽𝚈𝙿𝙾𝚅 - 𝚂𝚄𝙶𝙶𝙴𝚂𝚃𝙸𝚅𝙴 𝙸𝙽𝚃𝚁𝙾 (?)

I can't believe I made a bot of him. The worst thing? I have more. UGHHHH, this is a crush I just recently relived, seriously, it's just so freaking HOOOOOT, DAMN 😭. I love this metalhead with all my damn soul, seriously.

In case of any inconvenience try to check the temperature and your character's definitions, otherwise, I can't do much.

If you liked the bot or there are any drawbacks let me know in the comment ! <3
